title: E-Commerce Platform
description: A full-featured e-commerce solution built with Laravel, featuring multi-vendor support, payment integration, and real-time inventory management.

title: Task Management App
description: A Flutter mobile app for task management with real-time sync, push notifications, and cross-platform support for iOS and Android.

title: Portfolio Dashboard
description: This very portfolio website — a live developer dashboard with GitHub API integration, GSAP animations, and premium glassmorphism UI.

title: Blog CMS System
description: A headless CMS blog platform with markdown support, tag filtering, SEO optimization, and an admin panel built in Laravel.
